chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Civil Revision Application No.03 of 2026 Date Order with Signature of Judge 15.01.2026 Syed Muhammad Abdul Kabir, Advocate for the applicant. ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for the applicant does not wish to press this revision application and seeks its withdrawal. Accordingly, this revision application is disposed off as withdrawn alongwith pending application. J U D G E Asif
